description: A homeowner reports that sewage is backing up into their basement.

nodes.task_description: Gather the customer's address and details about the backup.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the incident details.

nodes.task_description: Check the wastewater network map to see if the issue is likely on the utility's main line or the customer's private lateral.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uses GIS to determine the likely location of the blockage.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a wastewater crew to investigate and clear the blockage if it's on the main line.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a high-priority work order for the wastewater team.
